title: In Asia, the big story in AI transformation is growth, says McKinsey partner at MWC 2026
description: Global leaders from McKinsey & Company, speaking at the Mobile World Congress 2026 (MWC), highlighted a significant shift in how artificial intelligence (AI) is being deployed across different geographic regions. In Asia, the focus of AI transformation remains anchored in driving growth rather than merely improving operational efficiency.

title: Ril, Adani, Google, Lightspeed Among Top Investors That Pledge $240 Bn During AI Summit
description: Major investors including Ril, Adani, Google and Lightspeed pledged USD 240 bn at the AI Summit, signalling strong global commitment towards artificial intelligence investments.
content:

description: The controversy began after reports suggested that OpenAI had entered into a major agreement with the Pentagon to provide artificial intelligence capabilities for defence-related applications.

title: Artificial intelligence could reduce emergency room mental health visits at CHEO
description: Researchers at CHEO are using AI to help reduce the number of children and youth who make return visits to emergency for mental health care.
content:
The Ottawa children's hospital has a higher rate of emergency visits for mental health needs than other comparable pediatric institutions across Canada, according to hospital officials.

title: Mizuho plans to replace 5,000 clerical jobs with AI in 10 years
description: Mizuho Financial Group Inc is planning to replace about 5,000 administrative jobs in Japan with artificial intelligence over the next 10 years, as the country's third-largest lender tries to boost productivity.
content:

title: South Korea, Singapore hold Summit to deepen AI and nuclear cooperation
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung met Singapore's Prime Minister Lawrence Wong for a summit aimed at expanding cooperation in fields such as artificial intelligence. The countries also signed five memoranda of understanding (MOUs) for cooperation in various fields.
content:
